_comment: Verifier configuration template. Copy and fill in for each workflow.

cron.name: {workflow}-independent-verifier
cron.message: Independent verifier for {workflow}. Check delivery state first. Do not re-run the main workflow to diagnose.

repairPrimitives._comment: One entry per failure class. Each primitive must be self-contained.

independence.testProcedure: Disable all main workflow crons. Inject failure. Verify verifier delivers.

alerts._comment: Alerts are informational only. Never 'I cannot proceed'. Always 'Delivered. Here is what was fixed.'
alerts.onFallback: Delivered {workflow} {slot} {date} using fallback inputs from {lkgDate}. Primary route was unavailable.
alerts.onEmergency: Emergency delivery record written to {path}. All send channels failed. Manual review required.
